name: Bounty Board
description: Dregg-native bounties: factory-born bounty cells whose lifecycle (OPEN -> CLAIMED -> SUBMITTED -> PAID) is a substrate-enforced state machine. Title is write-once, reward is immutable, state is strictly monotone, and the claimant slot is write-once (first-claimer-wins). The workflow rules are enforced by slot caveats, not app bookkeeping.

deos.mount: register_deos (src/lib.rs) — folds the composed DeosApp into the StarbridgeAppContext affordance registry; DeosApp::mount yields the axum router
deos.publish: Signature (the bounty cell is a dregg:// sturdyref an indexer on another federation reacquires)

affordances.view_bounty: cap-only, Signature (a WATCHER reads the lifecycle state)
affordances.claim: GATED (cap∧state), Either — posted precondition (STATE==OPEN); the fire submits the FULL claim (bind CLAIMANT_HASH + advance STATE), the executor re-enforcing WriteOnce(CLAIMANT_HASH) (first-claimer-wins) + StrictMonotonic(STATE)
affordances.submit: GATED (cap∧state), Either — claimed precondition (STATE==CLAIMED); the fire submits the FULL submit (bind SUBMISSION_HASH + advance STATE), the executor re-enforcing StrictMonotonic(STATE)
affordances.payout: GATED (cap∧state), None/root — submitted precondition (STATE==SUBMITTED); the fire advances STATE -> PAID (terminal), the executor re-enforcing StrictMonotonic(STATE)

deos.seam: CLOSED — the fire runs against the seeded bounty cell carrying the lifecycle program (WriteOnce title/reward/claimant/submission + StrictMonotonic(STATE)), so a NO-ADVANCE/REWOUND STATE and a CLAIMANT_HASH overwrite BITE in the deos fire path. STATE is StrictMonotonic (strict >), so a no-advance also bites — the lifecycle is a one-way ratchet (tests/deos_seam.rs)
